_publications._publicationTitle: Reprogramming Captures the Genetic and Tumorigenic Properties of Neurofibromatosis Type 1 Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: On average, NF1(−/−) 3PNFiPS and 5PNFiPS cell lines exhibited a 10%–15% increase in cell proliferation rate compared with control PSCs...NF1(−/−) iPSCs also exhibited a higher proliferation rate than NF1(+/−) iPSCs (p < 0.05)
details: Exhibited 10-15% increase in cell proliferation rate compared to control PSCs and higher proliferation rate than NF1(+/-) iPSCs (p < 0.05)
